rationales.hook_strength: 'Almost too easy' is a genuinely counterintuitive hook that earns the click, but 'The engine is built slow' as a sub risks losing readers who need a faster payoff promise.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is a single, actionable idea with a clean header and one concrete takeaway — the talk test slide alone could change how someone trains tomorrow.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 25-year-olds who dread the gym will love the permission to go easy, though 'mitochondria' on slide 3 briefly crosses into science-class territory for the overwhelmed segment.
rationales.novelty: Zone 2 has been the wellness internet's favorite topic for two years — the angle is solid but not fresh enough to stand out without a more surprising framing or data point.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct throughout, claims are appropriately hedged ('won't wreck' rather than 'prevents'), and the CTA ties naturally to step/movement tracking without AI-cringe or banned hype words.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the actionable dose slide, but the saturated zone-2 topic and lack of a truly scroll-stopping visual hook will limit organic reach against established fitness accounts.
